{{Quote|Tarfang is not a nice being.|[[Saba Sebatyne]]|<ref name="DN1" />}}
'''Tarfang''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. He served as [[Pilot/Legends|copilot]] on the [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] ''[[XR808g]]'' and later ''[[DR919a]]'' alongside the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Jae Juun]].

==Biography==
===Early life===
Tarfang was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] from the forest [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. He was unique among his [[Species/Legends|species]], in that he had left the sanctity of his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] to carve his own niche in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Tarfang's exploits often landed him in unfavorable positions, and his endeavors were usually of a criminal nature. By [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]], Tarfang's illegal activities had earned himself [[Death/Legends|death]] sentences in over ten [[Star system/Legends|star systems]]. He had also met and partnered himself by this time with [[Jae Juun]], a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and fellow [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]].

===The Dark Nest===
Tarfang and Juun met the Solos and the Skywalkers, when they were asking about the whereabouts of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Joiner]]s. He tagged along with Jae Juun during the [[Dark Nest Crisis]]. He along with Juun brokered a deal with some [[Squib/Legends|Squibs]] for some [[spinglass]] replicas of Luke's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-Wing]] and the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Falcon]] to send to the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fifth Fleet]] shortly after the [[Skirmish at Qoribu]]. He, along with Juun found Han Solo and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. The pair aided them in getting onto the [[Gorog|Dark Nest's]] [[nest ship]]. He showed his penchant for violence when [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] during combat briefly lost the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] of [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] that he had with him, Tarfang took it and viciously wielded it to dice up [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] to great effect. During the [[Swarm War]] Tarfang was recruited to serve in the [[Galactic Alliance Intelligence Service]] with Jae Juun, even when they had previously worked indirectly for the Killiks.

After the end of the Dark Nest Crisis, Tarfang and Juun continued to rise the intelligence ranks and continued going on missions for the Galactic Alliance.

===Second Galactic Civil War===
Tarfang and Juun would later reunite with the Solos on Kashyyyk before the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]]. Tarfang and Juun were watching the Wookiees and spotted the Solos, and attempted to arrest them. While at the [[Rock Council]] Tarfang fought Leia for control of the conversation as per customs. Since Leia was not able to use the Force the battle was difficult and brutal with Tarfang trying to choke Leia and bash her head against the rock. Eventually Leia tossed Tarfang off of the rock just as Luke arrived. Tarfang gave the jawbone, which granted whoever held it the right to speak at the Council, to Luke.

==Personality and traits==
Tarfang was fairly intelligent for an Ewok, and he was technically adept. Though unable to speak it, Tarfang could fully understand [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]]. Tarfang was also able to communicate with Killiks. Tarfang was considered particularly vicious for an Ewok; he exhibited a short, volatile temper, and flailed his arms about in an exaggerated fashion when angry. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Saba Sebatyne]] openly regarded the Ewok as an unpleasant being.
